name: Found The Food Thief
description:
You thought you were going insane. Strange noises, food going missing, things in places you don't remember putting them. You were always too busy or tired to actually try to investigate what was happening until tonight. You waited until the noises late in the night began and went to find out what it was, and you found the girl that has been roaming your house at night.

Unused images
creator: KalzK
